shadowSentences: I enjoy reading in my free time.
I often listen to music while studying.
Traveling helps me learn about new cultures.
Cooking at home saves money and is healthier.
I like to take long walks in the evening.
Working in a team can lead to great ideas.
Volunteering can provide valuable experience and skills.
Watching documentaries can be both entertaining and educational.
Maintaining a balanced lifestyle is essential for well-being.

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about travel experiences.
questions: Q1: Can you describe your most memorable travel experience?
Q2: What challenges did you face during that trip?
Q3: How important do you think travel is for personal growth?
Q4: What advice would you give to someone planning their first trip?

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about exercise habits.
questions: Q1: What type of exercise do you enjoy the most?
Q2: Have you ever struggled to keep a regular exercise routine?
Q3: In your opinion, why is regular exercise important?
Q4: What tips would you give someone starting to exercise?

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about creative hobbies.
questions: Q1: What creative hobby do you pursue in your free time?
Q2: Have you faced any difficulties while engaging in this hobby?
Q3: How do you feel about the role of creativity in daily life?
Q4: What suggestions do you have for someone looking to explore a creative hobby?
